name: Polish Commercial Legal
description_en: Analyze and draft contracts under Polish law—B2B, IP, and IT agreements (body leasing, NDA, deployments, SaaS, copyright transfer, settlements)—built by a Polish law firm.
description_zh: 按波兰法律分析与起草合同——B2B、知识产权与 IT 合同(人力外包、NDA、实施、SaaS、著作权转让、和解)——由一家波兰律师事务所打造。
long_en: Audits contractual risk, generates new agreements in the firm's house style, and checks clause consistency, grounded in the KTZR firm's clause base and "golden rules".
long_zh: 审计合同风险、按事务所风格生成新合同并校验条款一致性,以 KTZR 事务所的条款库与「黄金规则」为依据。
sec_note_en: Produces draft legal text, not legal advice; have a qualified lawyer review before use.
sec_note_zh: 产出的是法律文本草稿而非法律意见;使用前请由合格律师审阅。
